commands.review_summary:
This PR adds a `quota_exhausted` failover/auth-profile reason, maps periodic quota errors to long disabled backoff, emits an `agent:provider_tripped` hook, updates focused tests, and includes generated protocol plus script changes.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level, but not live: current main and docs classify periodic quota-window text as `rate_limit`, while the PR and discussion target a real Gemini quota cascade. I did not see after-fix proof against an exhausted provider account.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer product/API acceptance; the remaining blockers are not just a narrow automated repair because merge safety depends on the new quota contract and upgrade behavior.
